recommended_equipment.reason: Reliable Arte Defense option when the party reaches its first R10 shop upgrade.
Universal Footwear pick with a useful Stun-oriented skill while replacing older common drops.
High Arte Defense Ring for encounters where arte damage is the main danger.
Convenient late-story universal Ring when moving into the final equipment tiers.
Early Arte Attack Belt with fire-hit utility; a meaningful upgrade as rare R7 equipment begins appearing.
Accessible R8 Blade that keeps physical offense moving without waiting for a rare drop.
Late-story Blade with an offensive distribution suited to a frontline set.
Final-story Belt checkpoint before replacing the set with endgame equipment.
Late Footwear upgrade for the final route; compare its Master Skill before dismantling older shoes.
R18 main-game Blade to complete the progression before post-game tiers.
Keep the story weapon long enough to learn its Master Skill; it has a notably balanced offensive spread.
Direct shop replacement that is easy to obtain while entering the R10 equipment tier.
Late-story Short Swords choice with a final-tier Master Skill to learn.
Alternative final R17 Short Swords route, useful when the other weapon has already taught its skill.
Late Footwear upgrade for a durable close-range set.
Reliable Armor shop upgrade before the final R17 route.
Early Bag with strong Arte Attack value and a burn-oriented Master Skill.
Rare Paper checkpoint for a caster-focused stat split before the R10 shops.
Chest reward that provides a practical R13 Paper upgrade on the story route.
Shop Bag checkpoint that avoids relying on a rare drop for the next tier.
Late Paper route for learning a final main-game Master Skill.
R18 Bag to close out the story progression before post-game equipment.
Obtain it early, then keep it ready until Eizen joins; its Atk focus fits the Fist Bruiser phase.
Convenient R10 Pendant upgrade when advancing from early rare drops.
Rare R13 Pendant checkpoint with a useful late-story Master Skill to learn.
Chest option that can fill the same tier while farming other Master Skills.
Strong R15 Pendant milestone when switching toward late-story equipment.
Final-story Pendant option for the last equipment tier.
Early Earrings with a direct Arte Attack bonus for a ranged casting set.
Straightforward R10 Guardian upgrade from the shop tier.
R15 Guardian target with a caster-oriented progression point.
Late Earrings route for completing an Arte Attack-focused set.
Final main-game Guardian upgrade before post-game tiers.
R18 Earrings to finish the main-game equipment path.
R7 Spear whose Master Skill improves equipment-learning efficiency; learn it early once Eleanor is available.
Mid-story Spear milestone for an Atk-focused Martial Artes setup.
R13 Spear choice when preparing the stronger story-area equipment tiers.
Late-story Spear upgrade before the final route.
Women’s Shoes route that supplies a useful late Footwear upgrade.
Final-story Spear target for completing the main-game progression.
